title: pellaea goudotii
intro: Pellaea goudotii, also known as the Goudot's chain fern, is a species of fern native to Madagascar and other parts of the world. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Pellaea goudotii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat various skin problems. Pellaea goudotii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health concerns.
